sync_type: Unidirectional (Make → Slack via Slack module in Make scenarios)
popularity: medium-high — Make's Slack module one of most popular, used for notifications from thousands of app integrations

authentication_requirements.make_side: API Key per scenario (or OAuth per app). No rate limit per second, but monthly operation cap.
authentication_requirements.slack_side: OAuth 2.0 Bot Token (xoxb-). Scopes: chat:write, channels:read, files:write for file uploads.

common_use_cases: Google Sheets row added → Make scenario → Slack channel notification
Webhook received → Make transforms data → Slack message with Block Kit
Database query results → Make aggregates → Slack daily report summary
Multiple source events → Make dedup → Slack thread updates
Error monitoring → Make catches → Slack alert with error details

make_endpoints.purpose: Make manages Slack API calls internally via Slack module

slack_endpoints.purpose: Update existing Slack message (for progress updates)
Get channel info to verify bot access
Send ephemeral message to specific user

edge_cases_and_errors.error_code: Slack rate limit in Make scenarios
edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Make scenario processes 50 items in a loop. Each iteration sends a Slack message. Slack 1 req/sec per method causes 429 after first request.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Add 'Throttle' module in Make before Slack module. Set throttle to 1 second. Or aggregate messages and send one per batch.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Make's Slack connection expires or Slack bot token revoked. Make scenario shows 'Connection Error'. Scenario stops processing silently.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Set up Make scenario error handler route that sends email alert on connection error. Re-authenticate Slack connection in Make dashboard.

edge_cases_and_errors.error_code: Block Kit too complex for Make's JSON module
edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Make's JSON module struggles with nested Block Kit arrays. Missing comma or bracket breaks the entire Slack message.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Build Block Kit JSON as a single text string using Make's 'set variable' module. Validate with Slack Block Kit Builder before production.

edge_cases_and_errors.error_code: Message aggregation with Map function array limit
edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Make's Map function collects 200 items into array. Slack message with 200 items exceeds Slack block text limits. Static rendering fails.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Chunk the array: send multiple messages for > 50 aggregated items. Or send file attachment instead of message.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Make-generated file (CSV report, screenshot) > 1GB fails Slack upload. Slack silently rejects oversized files.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Limit file size in Make scenario before upload. Compress files if needed. Use Slack's file upload limits guide.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Make scenario sends to channel that was archived by admin. Slacks returns 'is_archived' error. Scenario fails.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Add error handler in Make to detect 'is_archived'. Route to different channel or notify admin.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Each Slack message = 1 Make operation. High-volume scenarios exhaust Make monthly operation limit (e.g., 10K on Pro plan).
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Reduce Slack notification frequency. Aggregate messages. Use Make's data store to batch notifications.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Slack Incoming Webhook URLs can expire or be deactivated. Make's Slack module using legacy webhooks stops working.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Migrate to Slack Bot Token (OAuth) instead of Incoming Webhooks. Bot tokens don't expire.

community_solutions.problem: Make scenario execution time vs Slack rate limit
community_solutions.solution: Make async scenarios don't respect Slack per-method rate limits across parallel executions. Use serial processing for Slack.

community_solutions.problem: Slack message formatting with HTML in source data
community_solutions.solution: Strip HTML tags from source data in Make before sending to Slack. Use Make's 'replace' function with regex.
